title: Podman secrets can not be labeled the way they are documented in this man-page
body:
Podman secrets can not be labeled the way they are documented in this man-page: `-l=key=val1,key2=val2` would result in a single label `"key1": "val1,key2=val2"`.  Either docs bad or implementation bad.

Also, what does `--label stringArray` mean in the `podman secret create --help` output? 

 _Originally posted by @ratijas in [9bb51e8](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/9bb51e8e96f98ab74d416a9af9bd708c7c503bdf#r177545892)_

comments.body:
I checked the code, and it seems to be a documentation bug. The label arguments in other commands are simply `#### **--label**, **-l**=*key=value*`.

> Also, what does --label stringArray mean in the podman secret create --help output?

You can specify the `--label` flag multiple times.

I still don't know what the point of having labels for secrets, but there you go, fixed. Strangely enough, `podman network inspect` returns lowercase JSON keys, unlike the two others (volume & secret) commands; and if labels weren't set, `network inspect` would skip the `"labels": {...}` object entirely. What makes it so special to warrant such differences?

So, sometimes "labels" is lowercase, sometimes it can be missing entirely, sometimes (`image inspect`) it can be `null`, and sometimes it's an empty object `{}`. Am I missing something?

I believe this is a historical issue. You can try creating an issue to investigate what is going on. Since fixing it would introduce a breaking change, it would be a good candidate for the 6.0 release.

I took a brief look, and found many layers of abstractions, it would take a few full time days to unwind what's going on and where. Also, I'm not experienced with Go either. I found one structure supposedly responsible for serialization of Network, but its "Labels" field is upper case and doesn't have that `json:",omitempty"` thing on it (which I assume should do what it says on the tin), so I'm completely lost so far.

Yeah, probably worth starting with an issue.
